name: 03-16-frontend-agent-panel
title: Frontend Agent Panel
description: Add a minimal Agent Panel to the Vue workspace for displaying agent tasks, output, and execution context without expanding to multi-panel collaboration.
creator: zquant
notes: Review failed. Code and error handling are improved, but the PRD still leaves acceptance criteria unchecked while claiming REVIEW: PASS. Verification records also do not clearly reconcile build vs. test expectations, so task documentation is not yet in a consistent final state.
